title: Pretty Pale Norwegian Cookies
description: Grassy and shattering Norwegian cookies served on a cedar plank, perfect for a sick day, featuring a unique spherified texture and raw-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix the almond flour, coconut sugar, and melted butter in a large bowl until well combined.
Add the eggs and vanilla extract to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll the dough into small balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the cookies for 18 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Allow the cookies to cool completely on the baking sheet.
Mix the sodium alginate and water in a small bowl until dissolved.
Drop the cooled cookies into the sodium alginate mixture and let sit for 30 seconds.
Remove the cookies from the mixture and place on the cedar plank to serve.
